title: Illuminated Glass
description: Adds glowing glass blocks and panes to brighten up your builds with style
body:
![Illuminated Glass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fcb7f74b531740266f38e89bad9012bc4e4f023_0.webp)

Adds glowing glass blocks and panes to brighten up your builds with style

**Discord: angel_mp4**


**Support me and the project**
